tasks.description: Add react-markdown and remark-gfm dependencies
steps: npm install react-markdown@^9.0.0 remark-gfm@^4.0.0 in control-panel
Verify packages appear in package.json dependencies
Verify npm install succeeds without errors

tasks.description: Define TypeScript types for ChatMessage, ToolCall, and SystemMessage
steps: ChatMessage interface exists with id, timestamp, thinking?, text, tools, isStreaming fields
ToolCall interface exists with id, tool, status, title?, summary, input, output?, error? fields
SystemMessage interface exists for events without messageID (id, timestamp, type, content)
Types compile without errors

tasks.description: Event aggregation logic groups events by messageID into ChatMessage objects
steps: Events with same messageID are grouped into single ChatMessage
Events without messageID render as system messages outside conversation flow
Events sorted by timestamp field (not arrival order)
Duplicate events (same ID) are deduplicated
Heartbeat events are filtered out
Handle message.updated events by updating ChatMessage metadata (title, status) without re-rendering parts

tasks.description: Delta accumulation appends streaming text correctly
steps: Delta events (properties.delta present) append to existing text buffer
Non-delta updates replace part content entirely
Maintain Map<partId, accumulatedText> in aggregation function for delta tracking
Multiple text parts in same message concatenate with double newlines
Delta map persists across aggregation calls (not recreated each render)
Unit test verifies delta append behavior
Unit test verifies full replacement behavior

tasks.description: Aggregate subtask events into nested message threads
steps: Extract subtask sessionID from subtask part
Filter events where event.content.sessionID matches subtask sessionID
Recursively aggregate subtask events into ChatMessage[] for nested rendering
Unit test verifies subtask messages are correctly grouped

tasks.description: ChatView container component renders virtualized list of messages
steps: ChatView component exists and accepts MinionEvent[] prop
Uses @tanstack/react-virtual for virtualization
Virtualization window renders ~20 items above/below viewport

tasks.description: ChatMessage component renders text as markdown with syntax highlighting
steps: Text content renders via react-markdown with remark-gfm
Code blocks render with react-syntax-highlighter and oneDark theme
Code blocks scroll horizontally (no forced line wrap)
Multiple sequential text parts concatenate cleanly
Empty or null content does not render (no blank bubbles)

tasks.description: ThinkingBlock renders collapsible reasoning content
steps: ReasoningPart events render as collapsible blocks
Default state is collapsed showing '▶ Thinking...'
Clicking expands to show full reasoning text
Collapsed state has muted, smaller styling

tasks.description: ToolCallCard renders compact expandable tool invocation cards
steps: ToolPart events render as compact single-line cards
Card shows icon (based on tool type), tool name, status badge, one-line summary
Define tool icon mapping (read=📖, write=✏️, edit=✏️, glob=🔍, grep=🔎, bash=⚙️, task=🤖, webfetch=🌐, fallback=🔧)
Status badge colors: pending (gray), running (blue pulse), completed (green), error (red)
Clicking card expands to show full input and output
Render tool input as syntax-highlighted JSON with react-syntax-highlighter (oneDark theme)

tasks.description: ToolCallCard accordion behavior auto-collapses previous cards
steps: Expanding a card auto-collapses previously expanded cards (accordion)
Only one tool card can be expanded at a time within a ChatMessage
Collapse animation is smooth (CSS transition)

tasks.description: ToolCallCard output truncation for large outputs
steps: Tool outputs >10KB are truncated with 'Show full output' button
Clicking 'Show full output' expands to show complete output
Truncated preview shows first ~500 chars with '...' indicator
Large inputs >10KB are also truncated with same pattern

tasks.description: Tool summaries are human-readable
steps: getToolSummary function exists matching spec
Read tool shows 'Read <filepath>'
Write tool shows 'Wrote <filepath>'
Edit tool shows 'Edited <filepath>'
Glob tool shows 'Found N files'
Grep tool shows 'Found N matches'
Bash tool shows 'Ran: <truncated command>'
Task tool shows 'Spawned <type>agent'
Unknown tools fall back to tool name

tasks.description: SubtaskBlock renders nested conversation threads
tasks.note: Depends on aggregation-3 for subtask event grouping
steps: subtask parts render as nested conversation threads
Default state collapsed with '▶ Subtask: [description]' header
Clicking expands to show subtask's messages inline (indented)
Subtask thread has visual distinction (left border or background)

tasks.description: SystemMessage component for events without messageID
steps: SystemMessage component renders events without messageID
Styled as subtle gray banner with timestamp on left
agent part type renders as 'Switched to X agent'
session.error renders as red error banner
retry part renders as warning banner ('⚠️ Retrying, attempt N')
Unknown event types render as muted system message

tasks.description: Real-time streaming updates appear as agent works
tasks.note: Depends on aggregation-2 (delta accumulation must work before testing streaming)
steps: New content appears in real-time as SSE events arrive
Streaming indicator shows while message still receiving events
Rapid delta events batch into single React render (~16ms debounce)

tasks.description: Auto-scroll behavior keeps view at bottom during streaming
steps: Auto-scroll keeps view at bottom by default
Scrolling up disables auto-scroll
'Jump to latest' button appears when auto-scroll disabled
Clicking 'Jump to latest' re-enables auto-scroll and scrolls to bottom
Button repositions appropriately on smaller screens

tasks.description: Error states handled gracefully
steps: session.error events render as error banners in chat (red background)
Malformed event JSON logs to console but doesn't crash UI
Missing messageID events render as system messages
SSE connection loss shows existing 'Reconnecting...' indicator
Unknown event types log warning and render as subtle system message

tasks.description: Loading and empty states provide clear feedback
steps: Initial page load shows skeleton loaders for chat area
'No events yet' state shows when minion hasn't produced output
Running minion with no events shows 'Waiting for agent to start...' with pulse animation
Reconnection after SSE drop shows 'Catching up...' indicator briefly
Completed minion with zero events shows 'No output produced' message

tasks.description: Replace EventLog with ChatView in minion detail page
steps: Remove EventLog and EventRow components from minion-detail-client.tsx
Import ChatView and wire to useMinionEvents hook
Verify connection status indicator still works
Verify 'Jump to latest' button positioning
Manual test: Load active minion, verify chat renders and streams

tasks.description: Performance handles hundreds of messages smoothly
steps: Markdown parsing results are memoized by part ID
Render performance smooth with 500+ messages (manual test)
No visible jank during rapid delta streaming

tasks.description: Basic responsive layout works on tablet-sized screens (768px+)
steps: Chat view is usable on tablet screens (768px+)
Tool cards remain readable on narrower screens
Code blocks scroll horizontally (no forced line wrap)

patterns: Syntax highlighting: react-syntax-highlighter with oneDark theme
Event structure: { id, timestamp, event_type, content }
